info.title: Data2Evidence Usermgmt Api API
info.description: Source-derived OpenAPI spec for one Data2Evidence service/function. Tags describe UI usage, backend coverage, and handler trace state.

tags.name: backend-implemented
tags.description: A backend route declaration was found for this operation.

tags.name: backend-only
tags.description: A backend route exists, but no current UI call was found.

tags.name: backend:alp-usermgmt
tags.description: Operation is declared by the alp-usermgmt backend function.

tags.name: handler-found
tags.description: The backend route was traced to a concrete controller/router handler.

tags.name: handler-unresolved
tags.description: The route is known from UI or route metadata, but no concrete backend handler was found.

tags.name: service:usermgmt-api
tags.description: Operation belongs to the usermgmt-api service/function surface.

tags.name: ui-used
tags.description: Operation is called by at least one Data2Evidence UI.

tags.name: ui:portal
tags.description: Operation is called by the portal UI.

UnknownJson.description: Shape not inferred from UI or backend source.
